scripts.setup:local: doppler setup --project lexrunit --config dev && doppler secrets download --no-file --format=env > .dev.vars
scripts.deploy:stg: doppler setup --project lexrunit --config stg && doppler secrets download --no-file --format=json | wrangler secret bulk --name lexrunit-base-backend-stg && wrangler deploy --name lexrunit-base-backend-stg
scripts.deploy:prd: doppler setup --project lexrunit --config prd && doppler secrets download --no-file --format=json | wrangler secret bulk --name lexrunit-base-backend && wrangler deploy --name lexrunit-base-backend
